title: China trade 'small deal' — Boeing 200 jets (market expected 500, stock -4%), US oil/LNG/soybeans purchase; China hasn't confirmed; no joint communique
snippet: Trump and executive delegation leave China with few deals to show. China agreed to buy 200 Boeing 737 jets — less than half the 500 market expected, sending Boeing shares down nearly 4%. Trump told Fox News China will buy US crude oil, but China hasn't confirmed details. No formal joint communique issued. Trump calls deals 'fantastic'; analysts say 'small deal.'
tag_reason: 정상회담 무역 결과 보도는 이전 소스에 없음. 신규 경제 딜 세부사항.
